h1.visual_description: Large font size (~24pt), sans-serif, left-aligned, multi-line title on the first page.
h1.example_text: CellPace: A temporal diffusion-forcing framework for simulation, interpolation and forecasting of single-cell dynamics

h2.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif, left-aligned, significantly larger than body text, used for major sections like Abstract, Introduction, Results.

h3.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif, left-aligned, same font size as body text or slightly larger, used for sub-sections within Results or Methods.
h3.example_text: CellPace is a generative framework for modeling continuous single-cell temporal dynamics

h4.visual_description: Italicized, sans-serif, left-aligned, often followed by a colon or used as a sub-header in Methods.

visual_matchers.pattern: Bold 'Fig.' followed by a number and a vertical pipe
Multi-panel diagrams with alphabetical labels (a, b, c...) in bold sans-serif
Numbered list with hanging indents and italicized journal titles
Superscript numbers following names or within text
Blue hyperlinked text at the top of every page

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX style inline (e.g., $X_{GEX}$) or block notation for variables and equations.
markdown_grammar.table_style: Standard markdown tables with bold headers; often represented as heatmaps or dot plots in visual figures.
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numerical indices in square brackets, e.g., [1], [10-12].

layout_info.header_footer_pattern: Header contains preprint DOI and license info in small blue/black text; Footer contains right-aligned Arabic numeral page numbers.
